name: Matzos Chocolate Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks until very light and creamy.
2. Gradually add the sugar, beating continuously until well combined.
3. Add the blanched almonds, grated sweet chocolate, raisins, sifted matzo meal, wine, and orange juice to the mixture. Stir gently to combine.
4. Fold in the beaten egg whites until just incorporated, being careful not to overmix.
5. Pour the batter into a greased spring form pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven until set.
